title: Sensor rail + analog read + fault LED
prompt: Design the analog section for an STM32F103 instrument. Take a 5 V input, regulate a 3.3 V rail that powers the STM32, bring a pre-conditioned analog sensor signal (already 0-3.3 V) into an ADC pin, and add a fault LED on a GPIO with a current-limit resistor. For the bench test the sensor reads mid-scale (~1.65 V) and the rail should be 3.3 V.

abstraction.reason: the pre-conditioned sensor presents a fixed voltage (a #105 voltage_source stand-in); the LDO rail and LED driver are real modelled parts
